name: Tamale Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Meat (chopped ham, chicken, Ground beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornmeal, milk and egg in a large bowl; set aside.
2. In a skillet, brown the meat with oil and onion over medium heat until no longer pink.
3. Add tomatoes and oregano to the skillet; cook for 5 minutes.
4. Pour off excess fat from the skillet.
5. Add sliced green olives and cottage cheese (if using) to the skillet; stir to combine.
6. Stir the cornmeal mixture into the skillet contents until well combined.
7. Turn the mixture into a casserole dish.
8. Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until heated through and bubbly.
